test_cases.input: The repo already uses agents-stack and this work will span multiple sessions. Set up the control model and handoff rules so the next agent can continue building the UI.
test_cases.rationale: Layered control policy over an existing agents-stack workflow belongs in harness-design.

test_cases.input: The implementation slice is written in docs/live/contract.md. Please approve or reject it before the generator starts.
test_cases.rationale: Pre-execution slice approval belongs in contract-review.

test_cases.input: The login flow is already built. Please open the browser and verify the error states before merge.
test_cases.rationale: Independent browser acceptance belongs in frontend-evaluator.

test_cases.input: I just finished the feature and want the durable lessons captured for future sessions.
test_cases.rationale: Postflight knowledge extraction belongs in compound.

test_cases.input: I have a raw idea for a new product. We should build an AI code reviewer.
test_cases.rationale: Net-new product definition routes to greenfield-product, not delivery-control.
